game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
A combination of platforming with a gravity gun, BEEP is an amazing physics-platformer. Despite its friendly art style, this is a hardcore platformer in the truest sense. From the minds of former LucasArts and BioWare employees comes the critically-acclaimed BEEP.
BEEP is a challenging platformer powered by an amazing physics engine.

Use your gravity gun to explore a huge galaxy filled with dangerous enemies and treacherous hazards.

"BEEP delivers an authentic platformer experience with enthralling gameplay mechanics... Whether you’re swinging above a lava pit, moving blocks to solve various puzzles, or simply pelting enemies with the carcasses of their allies, the anti-gravity gun is what carries this game and makes it unique. It’s a must buy for any platform gamer..."
-Digital Entanglement
game_info.description: BEEP is a hardcore physics platformer where you control a small robot navigating through dangerous levels filled with hazards and enemies. Use your powerful gravity gun to manipulate blocks, defeat enemies, and solve puzzles. Swing across chasms, build bridges, and use physics to your advantage. Reach the goal platform to complete each level while managing your limited energy. The gravity gun can attract or repel objects - master both modes to survive!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, look up/down
Space: Jump (hold for higher jump)
Z: Toggle gravity gun mode (Attract/Repel)
Shift: Fire gravity gun (hold to maintain force)
ESC: Pause/Unpause
Enter: Start game
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and physics testing. Validates that the player can move, jump, and interact with the environment properly. Tests gravity gun basic functionality.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move through the level using basic controls. Test jumping mechanics and gravity gun on nearby objects. Attempt to reach platforms and interact with blocks.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should successfully move, jump, and use gravity gun without errors. All physics interactions should work correctly. Test passes if player can navigate for 500 frames without crashes.

TEST_2.test_description: Winning strategy test. Implements optimal gameplay to complete the level and reach the goal platform while managing energy and avoiding hazards.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate through the level strategically using gravity gun to move blocks and create paths. Avoid lava pits and enemies. Use blocks as shields and stepping stones. Reach the goal platform efficiently.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches the goal platform and achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state. Energy is managed effectively. All obstacles are overcome using the gravity gun mechanics.

TEST_3.test_description: Enemy interaction testing. Tests combat mechanics using gravity gun to manipulate objects and defeat enemies.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Use gravity gun to pick up blocks and throw them at enemies. Test both attract and repel modes in combat situations. Validate enemy collision and defeat mechanics.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Enemies are successfully defeated using physics-based combat. Player can use blocks as projectiles. Score increases appropriately when enemies are eliminated.
